title: U.S. Navy F/A-18 disables Iranian tankers Sea Star III and Sevda in Gulf of Oman — blockade enforcement intensifies
snippet: CENTCOM: U.S. forces disabled M/T Sea Star III and M/T Sevda on May 8 prior to both vessels entering an Iranian port on the Gulf of Oman in violation of the ongoing U.S. blockade. A U.S. Navy F/A-18 Super Hornet from USS George H.W. Bush (CVN-77) launched precision munitions at the smokestacks of both vessels, disabling them and preventing them from completing their voyage to Iran.
tag_reason: 이전 7일 소스에 동일/유사 항목 없음. 5/8 신규 봉쇄 집행 사건.

entities.name: US disables tankers Sea Star III & Sevda
